overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a historic Middle Eastern city. The character navigates through narrow market streets, a central courtyard with a fountain, and covered bazaar areas featuring Islamic architecture, palm trees, and period-appropriate NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with mud brick buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow market street toward the courtyard entrance

entered.detail: tan-colored mud brick structures with small windows lining the street
large bush with vibrant purple flowers growing against a building wall
stacked wooden cargo crates and barriers along the building edge
wooden market stalls with fabric coverings displaying goods
tall date palm trees visible above the building rooftops

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow, sunlit market street lined with historic mud brick buildings. Wooden crates and market stalls line the path while pedestrians move through the dusty corridor. A large purple flowering bush marks the transition point to the courtyard ahead.

events.description: exits narrow street into open courtyard with central octagonal fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the central fountain while observing the courtyard

notable_agents.action: woman in dark robes standing near the fountain edge observing the water

entered.detail: large stone octagonal fountain with multiple tiers in the courtyard center
prominent building with green tiled dome and arched entryways
covered walkway with stone columns and arches lining the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright sunlit courtyard dominated by a large octagonal stone fountain. A distinctive green-domed building rises in the background while the character circles the fountain perimeter. Stone arcades line the courtyard edges providing partial shade.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with decorative rugs and potted plants

events.description: ascends stone stairs to upper level walkway with archways

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and walking through the upper arcade area with decorative elements

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading up to the elevated walkway
colorful patterned carpets laid out on the stone floor of the walkway
ornate stone archway with carved details marking the passage to upper level

segments.scene_description: The character ascends weathered stone stairs to an elevated walkway decorated with colorful rugs and potted flowers. The space is semi-covered with dappled sunlight filtering through stone archways, creating a sheltered atmosphere above the main courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bazaar alley with fabric canopies

events.description: exits stone archway into covered market area with hanging fabric canopies
emerges from shaded canopy area into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered bazaar section toward the open plaza with stone steps

notable_agents.action: merchant in green robes standing near rolled carpets and goods

entered.detail: large green fabric awnings suspended overhead providing shade for the market
large woven wicker baskets stacked near market stalls
wide stone staircase leading up to a grand building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking under suspended green fabric canopies through a covered bazaar section lined with wicker baskets and market goods. The character emerges from the shaded alley into a bright open area featuring wide stone steps leading to a grand mud brick building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, dusty market street into a grand architectural complex of courtyards and covered bazaars. It begins by navigating a sunlit corridor of mud brick buildings and market stalls, passing a large purple flowering bush that signals the opening into a bright courtyard. As the space expands, the camera circles a large octagonal stone fountain set against the backdrop of a green-domed building and shaded stone arcades. The scene then shifts upward as the character ascends weathered stone stairs to an elevated walkway adorned with colorful rugs and potted flowers under dappled sunlight. Finally, the path leads through a shaded bazaar section beneath suspended green fabric canopies before emerging into a bright open area with wide stone steps leading toward a grand mud brick building.
